Example_EN: There is a clear pattern in her weekly study plan.
Example_CN: 她每周学习计划有清晰规律。

Example_EN: Please pause the video while I take notes.
Example_CN: 我记笔记时请暂停视频。

Example_EN: Online payment is safer than sending cash.
Example_CN: 在线支付比寄现金更安全。

Example_EN: She needs peace and quiet to finish the essay.
Example_CN: 她需要安静来完成作文。

Example_EN: They found a peaceful place beside the lake.
Example_CN: 他们在湖边找到安静之处。

Example_EN: Traffic is worst during peak hours in the morning.
Example_CN: 早高峰时段交通最糟糕。

Example_EN: Would you like peanut butter on your toast?
Example_CN: 吐司上要不要花生酱？

Example_EN: The novel describes peasant life in the nineteenth century.
Example_CN: 小说描写十九世纪农民生活。
MemoryTip: peasant：农民（历史或文学语境常见）。

Example_EN: He scored from a penalty kick in the final minute.
Example_CN: 他最后一分钟点球得分。

Collocation: cost a penny;spend a penny;every penny
Example_EN: This stamp did not cost a penny more than five.
Example_CN: 这枚邮票只需五便士。

Collocation: state pension;pension plan;live on a pension
Example_EN: Her grandparents live on a modest state pension.
Example_CN: 她祖父母靠不多的国家养老金生活。

Collocation: perceive as;perceive a change;hard to perceive
Example_EN: Children often perceive rules as unfair at first.
Example_CN: 孩子们起初常觉得规则不公平。

Example_EN: Only ten percent of students arrived late today.
Example_CN: 今天只有百分之十的学生迟到。

Example_EN: A high percentage of voters supported the plan.
Example_CN: 很高比例的选民支持该计划。

Example_EN: The advert changed public perception of the brand.
Example_CN: 广告改变了公众对该品牌的看法。

Example_EN: The instructions were perfectly clear this time.
Example_CN: 这次说明非常清楚。

Example_EN: The team will perform a short play for parents.
Example_CN: 剧组将为家长表演短剧。

Example_EN: Tickets for the live performance sold out quickly.
Example_CN: 现场演出的票很快售罄。

Example_EN: A street performer drew a large crowd in the square.
Example_CN: 街头艺人在广场吸引了大量人群。

Example_EN: She finally found a permanent job in Leeds.
Example_CN: 她终于在利兹找到一份稳定工作。

Example_EN: You need permission before you take photos here.
Example_CN: 在这里拍照前需要许可。

Example_EN: Does this ticket permit you to enter the museum?
Example_CN: 这张票允许你进入博物馆吗？

Example_EN: Her strong personality helps her lead the team.
Example_CN: 她强势的个性帮助她领导团队。

Example_EN: Personally, I prefer trains to long bus rides.
Example_CN: 就我个人而言，我更喜欢火车而非长途大巴。

Example_EN: Travel gives you a new perspective on home.
Example_CN: 旅行让你以新视角看待家乡。

Example_EN: Can you persuade him to join the study group?
Example_CN: 你能说服他加入学习小组吗？

Example_EN: We are now in the final phase of the project.
Example_CN: 我们现处于项目最后阶段。

Example_EN: The Northern Lights are a famous natural phenomenon.
Example_CN: 北极光是著名的自然现象。

Example_EN: She plans to study philosophy at university.
Example_CN: 她计划在大学学习哲学。

Example_EN: A professional photographer took the wedding pictures.
Example_CN: 一位职业摄影师拍了婚礼照片。

Example_EN: He took a short course in digital photography.
Example_CN: 他学了一门短的数字摄影课。

Example_EN: Daily physical exercise improves sleep quality.
Example_CN: 每日体育锻炼改善睡眠质量。

Example_EN: She felt physically tired after the long hike.
Example_CN: 长途徒步后她感到身体疲惫。

Example_EN: Ask your family physician about the side effects.
Example_CN: 向家庭医生询问副作用。

Example_EN: She is preparing for her physics exam next week.
Example_CN: 她在准备下周物理学考试。

Collocation: pile of books;pile up;in a pile
Example_EN: There is a pile of books on her bedroom floor.
Example_CN: 她卧室地板上有一堆书。

Example_EN: Take this pill with a full glass of water.
Example_CN: 用满杯水服下这片药。

Example_EN: She trains hard to become an airline pilot.
Example_CN: 她刻苦训练想成为航线飞行员。

Example_EN: Please pin the notice on the classroom board.
Example_CN: 请把通知钉在教室黑板上。

Example_EN: She was a pioneer of modern online education.
Example_CN: 她是现代在线教育的先驱。

Example_EN: A burst pipe flooded the kitchen overnight.
Example_CN: 爆裂水管一夜淹没了厨房。

Example_EN: The match will be played on the school football pitch.
Example_CN: 比赛将在学校足球场进行。

Example_EN: What a pity that the concert was cancelled!
Example_CN: 音乐会取消真可惜！

Example_EN: Please explain the rule in plain English.
Example_CN: 请用明白的英语解释这条规则。

Example_EN: Scientists search for water on distant planets.
Example_CN: 科学家在遥远行星上寻找水。

Example_EN: Careful planning made the trip run smoothly.
Example_CN: 仔细规划让旅行顺利进行。

Example_EN: Please wait on platform three for the London train.
Example_CN: 请在三号站台等候开往伦敦的火车。

Example_EN: We had pleasant weather throughout the holiday.
Example_CN: 整个假期天气宜人。

Example_EN: It was a great pleasure to meet your family.
Example_CN: 见到你家人非常高兴。

Collocation: plot of a film;garden plot;plot against
Example_EN: Can you summarise the plot of the film in three lines?
Example_CN: 你能用三行概括电影情节吗？

Example_EN: She wants to become a poet and publish her work.
Example_CN: 她想成为诗人并出版作品。

Example_EN: He started to write poetry after university.
Example_CN: 大学毕业后他开始写诗。

Example_EN: Keep rat poison far away from children and pets.
Example_CN: 把灭鼠药放在儿童和宠物够不到的地方。

Example_EN: Do not touch that snake; it may be poisonous.
Example_CN: 别碰那条蛇，它可能有毒。

Example_EN: Explorers dreamed of reaching the North Pole.
Example_CN: 探险家梦想到达北极。

Collocation: local policeman;ask a policeman;policeman on duty
Example_EN: A local policeman showed us the way to the station.
Example_CN: 一位本地警察给我们指了去车站的路。
MemoryTip: police + man：男警察（现多用 officer）。

Example_EN: The school has a strict policy on mobile phones.
Example_CN: 学校对手机有严格政策。

Example_EN: Climate change is now a major political issue.
Example_CN: 气候变化现已成为重大政治议题。

Example_EN: A local politician visited the school yesterday.
Example_CN: 一位本地政客昨天访问了学校。

Example_EN: Students debated world politics in the club meeting.
Example_CN: 学生在社团会议上辩论世界政治。

Example_EN: Air pollution makes summer days harder to enjoy.
Example_CN: 空气污染使夏日更难享受。

Example_EN: Ducks swam across the quiet garden pond.
Example_CN: 鸭子游过安静的花园池塘。

Example_EN: She listens to pop music on the way to school.
Example_CN: 她上学路上听流行音乐。

Example_EN: The population of the city has doubled in twenty years.
Example_CN: 这座城市人口二十年翻了一番。

Example_EN: Cargo ships wait outside the busy port.
Example_CN: 货船在繁忙港口外等候。

Example_EN: They hung a family portrait above the fireplace.
Example_CN: 他们把全家福挂在壁炉上方。

Collocation: pose a question;pose for a photo;pose a risk
Example_EN: May I pose a question about the homework?
Example_CN: 我可以就作业提个问题吗？

Example_EN: Do you possess a valid passport for travel?
Example_CN: 你有有效的旅行护照吗？

Example_EN: Please look after personal possessions on the train.
Example_CN: 请在火车上保管好个人物品。

Example_EN: There is a strong possibility of snow tonight.
Example_CN: 今晚很有可能下雪。

Collocation: possibly true;as soon as possibly;could possibly
Example_EN: We could possibly finish before six if we hurry.
Example_CN: 如果加快，我们或许六点前能完成。

Collocation: film poster;put up a poster;poster on
Example_EN: Please put up a poster about the school fair.
Example_CN: 请张贴一张关于学校义卖的海报。

Example_EN: She planted herbs in a small flower pot.
Example_CN: 她在小花盆里种了香草。

Example_EN: Good coaching helps athletes reach their full potential.
Example_CN: 良好执教帮助运动员发挥全部潜力。

Example_EN: Please pour some tea for our guests.
Example_CN: 请为客人倒些茶。

Example_EN: Charities work hard to reduce poverty in the city.
Example_CN: 慈善机构努力减少城市贫困。

Example_EN: Add washing powder before you start the machine.
Example_CN: 开机前加入洗衣粉。

Example_EN: A power cut left the whole street in darkness.
Example_CN: 停电让整条街陷入黑暗。

Example_EN: Her powerful speech moved the whole audience.
Example_CN: 她有力的演讲打动了全体听众。

Example_EN: The course offers practical advice for job interviews.
Example_CN: 这门课提供求职面试的实用建议。

Example_EN: The work is practically finished; only one page left.
Example_CN: 工作差不多完成了，只剩一页。

Example_EN: Teachers praise students who help their classmates.
Example_CN: 老师表扬帮助同学的学生。

Example_EN: They pray for peace every Sunday morning.
Example_CN: 他们每周日早晨为和平祈祷。

Example_EN: She said a quiet prayer before the exam began.
Example_CN: 考试开始前她默默祈祷。

Example_EN: Please give me the precise time of your arrival.
Example_CN: 请告诉我你到达的确切时间。

Example_EN: That is precisely why we need more practice.
Example_CN: 那正是我们需要更多练习的原因。

Collocation: predict the weather;hard to predict;predict that
Example_EN: It is hard to predict the weather this month.
Example_CN: 这个月天气很难预测。

Example_EN: Her weather prediction for the weekend was correct.
Example_CN: 她对周末天气的预测是正确的。

Example_EN: Tea is my personal preference over coffee.
Example_CN: 相较于咖啡，我个人更偏爱茶。

Example_EN: The pregnant woman sat down near the door.
Example_CN: 那位孕妇在门边坐下。

Example_EN: The plan starts from the premise that everyone will help.
Example_CN: 计划基于人人都会帮忙的前提。

Example_EN: Careful preparation makes speaking tests less stressful.
Example_CN: 仔细准备让口语考试不那么紧张。

Example_EN: Please switch off phones in the presence of patients.
Example_CN: 在病人面前请关闭手机。

Example_EN: She will give a presentation on recycling tomorrow.
Example_CN: 她明天将做关于回收的演示。

Example_EN: Museums help preserve history for future generations.
Example_CN: 博物馆帮助为后代保存历史。

Example_EN: Students often feel under pressure before exams.
Example_CN: 学生考前常感到压力。

Example_EN: She is late, presumably because of the traffic.
Example_CN: 她迟到了，大概因为堵车。

Example_EN: Children love to pretend that they are pirates.
Example_CN: 孩子们喜欢假装自己是海盗。

Example_EN: Good locks can prevent theft in the flats.
Example_CN: 好的锁能防止公寓失窃。

Example_EN: Please bring notes from the previous lesson.
Example_CN: 请带上节课的笔记。
